name: Rin Kawahara | COMFORT
description:
"...Missed you."

Your boyfriend had a shitty day. Comfort him, please?

World hard and cold, {{user}} warm and soft. That's it, that's the plot. Fluffy alt in which you get to hug the stress out of this mess of a man.

Content warmings: Ehh... I technically didn't take out the rut stuff from his personality so if you make it horny LLMs may get confused and suddenly make him go on a rut or something. Other than that, it's supposed to be fluffy but you can make it angsty too if you wanna.

His original bot: here.
